subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.11
question_html:
Which molecule is most polar?

A.  CF4

B.  CCl4

C.  CHF3

D.  CClF3
examiners_html: Question 11 was identified in the G2s as a tricky question, because students could have difficulty resolving the conflict between the greater polarity of the C-Cl bond compared with the C-H bond, and their contrast with the polarity of the C-F bond.) However, 56% of student did identify the correct answer of C.
